focus: [D3-A7/D3] utilization invisible in live dispatch: require a machine-readable ROUTED workflowMode declaration

graphEvents.label: How can live sk-design dispatch prove the selected workflowMode rather than only proving stated resources?
The live benchmark prompt and parser capture surface/resources/assets, but no sk-design workflowMode or ordered mode bundle
parseLiveResult always returns observedIntents: [], so live expected intentKeys can score intentRecall=0 even when resources are present
The context manifest proves loaded design files, but it does not prove the route decision that made those files required
Existing modePrecision is explicitly advisory, so it cannot fail missing or wrong live mode declarations
Live parent-hub utilization must emit a registry-valid ROUTED workflowMode token before context manifest and proof rows can satisfy routing enforcement

label: live dispatch captures surface/resources/assets but no sk-design workflowMode declaration
recommendation: Extend live routing-analysis prompts and parsers to require ROUTED: skill=sk-design workflowMode=<registry-key> routeOutcome=<single|orderedBundle|defer> workflowModes=<csv> packet=<packet> source=<hub-router|mode-hint>.

label: empty observedIntents explains the live intentRecall=0 class
recommendation: Populate observedWorkflowMode, observedWorkflowModes, and observedIntents from the parsed ROUTED token before D1-intra scoring; score expected.workflowMode and expected.modeBundle directly instead of inferring mode from resource overlap.

label: context manifests prove file loading, not the route decision that required those files
recommendation: Require ROUTED before CONTEXT MANIFEST, then validate every declared workflowMode against mode-registry.json and require each declared mode to have a matching MODE BUNDLE LOADED proof row.

label: modePrecision reports mode mismatch but cannot gate live utilization
recommendation: Add a gated parent-hub route-declaration dimension or first-failing stage before resource recall: route-declaration-missing, route-mode-mismatch, then resource/content proof.

label: Live parent-hub utilization must emit a registry-valid ROUTED workflowMode token before context manifest and proof rows can satisfy routing enforcement

direction: Treat MODE BUNDLE LOADED as sufficient live route proof
reason: It proves files were named as loaded, but not which workflowMode won, whether a bundle was intentional, or whether the route came from a hub-router decision versus incidental loading.
